selection_basis.ledger_reason: This is the next untouched compact ZIPv2 sibling after the packet-e2e handoff batch and the clearest request-side bootstrap contradiction object in the same strip.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the parent into a smaller request-bootstrap batch that preserves request-only outbound handoff, packet-mode labeling without inbound strategy material, three requested steps versus one immediate handoff row, inert final state with lexical shells, outer save-state hash versus zero-hash scaffold, and relocation residue without promoting any of it.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Best next sibling once the request-side bootstrap contradiction packet is preserved.
Useful later for broader packet-failure comparison outside the compact ZIPv2 strip.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent packet already retains the zero-work request profile, packet-label contradiction, inert lexical state shell, save-packet scaffold split, and relocation residue needed for second-pass refinement, and the consulted A2-mid anchors already preserve the closest ZIPv2 sibling seam and empty-packet handoff floor.
